title: Mr. 3 Begins His Operation
description: On pages 3–6, mr. 3 begins his operation as the battle between Dorry and Brogy is poisoned by interference, pushing Luffy and Usopp toward a furious confrontation.
scene: Mr. 3 Begins His Operation. The battle between Dorry and Brogy is poisoned by interference, pushing Luffy and Usopp toward a furious confrontation. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: What is it, hmm? Ah, hold on a moment.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Ahh... when it comes to black tea, nothing beats earl grey, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I'm bored.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: You say you're bored, but you're not exactly fond of working either, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Yup.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Then why don't you try to enjoy this blissful time away from our duties?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: After all, leisurely enjoying our break is also one of our privileges as an officer agent, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: And also... would you mind not calling me by my codename so casually in a public place like this?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Otherwise,

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: baroque works officer agent MR. 3

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Don't you think people will find out I'm Mr. 3?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Baroque works officer agent Miss GoldenWeek

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Oh, really?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: By the way... you've been staring intently at that paper for the past few days. What is it exactly?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: An order from the boss.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Can't you tell me that sooner!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 5
dialogue.text: It seems Mr. 5 has been beaten... Oh, don't you wish if somebody were to be beaten, it'd be Mr. 2?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Then we could be promoted.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Well, if only Mr. S has been beaten, the matter is nothing to panic about, don't you think?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: After all, that man is just an overconfident fool who overestimates his abilities.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No matter how power- full one's devil fruit ability is,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: without the talent to use it effectively, one will forever be a useless bum.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: A brilliant criminal uses his brilliant intellect to carry out his objectives, you know.

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Why don't we go and teach *them* the terror of anticipating a criminal organization?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Don't you long for our home, DORRY?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: That's exactly why I'll crush you today and leave for Elbaf at once, Brogy!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 3
dialogue.text: Nue!!!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 3 begins his operation. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
